allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Teams:', j.standings.length\); console.log\('Top 5:', j.standings.slice\(0,5\).map\(t => t.name + ' ' + t.wins + 'W'\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./standings_tmp.json'\); console.log\('Teams:', j.standings.length\); console.log\('Top 5:', j.standings.slice\(0,5\).map\(t => t.name + ' ' + t.wins + 'W-' + t.losses + 'L'\).join\(', '\)\)")
